description: S1 batch=32, eval_every=5, patience=12 — worse, early stop epoch 65
Source replay 30% in Stage 2 — worse by 2pp
H=64 backbone (d=64, gru_hidden=64) — worse, S2 slower
Dual head (CE + articulatory) — worse, articulatory head didn't help cross-patient
S1 fixed 30 epochs cosine, no val split, no early stop — worse
Progressive unfreezing S2 (freeze backbone 30 epochs) — worse, S2 folds too short
S2 patience 15, epochs 300 — worse, more patience allows more overfitting
S1 eval every 5 — worse, S1 best checkpoint at epoch 5 is undertrained
Lighter S2 augment + no mixup — close to baseline (0.769 vs 0.764) but not better
Stronger S1 reg (dropout 0.5, WD 5e-4) — too much regularization
Multi-patient k-NN (source embeddings as extra neighbors, weight 0.5) — NEW BEST
